author: Jay
description: Enforce shared base settings across multi-user vaults by deeply merging template JSON files into config files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: jaide
manifest.description: Enforce shared base settings across multi-user vaults by deeply merging template JSON files into config files.
manifest.name: Base Settings

name: Base Settings

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description: Previously when a file like appearance.json would get modified and no template existed, it would get completely clobbered and the old version would be written reverting the change. Now files without templates are ignored.
releases.name: Fix Clobbering JSON files without templates

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description:
Previously, when the destination format was an array for example when trying to create a base-settings/community-plugins.json file, the resulting .obsidian/community-plugins.json would be transformed from an array into an object with numerical keys. 

Now it will retain the target format resulting in arrays.
releases.name: Improve Array Handling

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description: As per community plugin submission review comments, the sync command will be automatically name spaced so the plugin id can be excluded from the command name
releases.name: Rename Sync Command

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description: Addresses review feedback on the submission into the Obsidian community plugins repo
releases.name: Prepare for Public Release

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description:
- Improve compliance with https://docs.obsidian.md/Plugins/Releasing/Plugin+guidelines
- Switch to MIT license
releases.name: Comply with Plugin Guidelines

releases.author: jaidetree
releases.description:
- Provides a setting to customize the path of the base settings files
- Provides a setting to customize the debounce interval when changes are detected
- Provides a command "Base Settings: Sync Settings" to apply base settings
- Runs the sync process on startup
- Runs the sync process when create or update events occur in the .obsidian directory
releases.name: Initial Release
